Large vine with huge sweet grapes hanging mostly over the sidewalk side of the fence. Seem to be untouched by the property owner. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-September.

This plant was planted by me as a seed, 23 years ago!  However, my family moved away from this property and it is now a rental.  Ask tenants to access this beauty. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
White seedless grapes hanging over cement wall on north side of Antelope drive just as you go up the hill Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: August-August.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

Grapes hang over my fence. Anything facing the street is fair game. You might also be able to pick some pears. Hopefully the neighborhood kids didn't eat all of them before you get there. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
Plums Green Seedless grapes, black/purple grapes, & Walnuts (Walnuts Should be ripe soon/this fall). Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
Plums Green Seedless grapes, black/purple grapes, & Walnuts (Walnuts Should be ripe soon/this fall). Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
Great yield for such little trees! Access: Public.
It is a few paces behind the job corps gate, but if you were quick you might be able to grab some without trouble. Should be fully ripened by late august, mid September Access: Private.
About 7 of these trees along the road . Produce small sour fruit, may become better ripened with time, but these trees are over harvested by students and birds Access: Private.
